description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a sprawling, open layout. The structure features a mix of white and light gray exterior walls, large windows, and several distinct sections, including a garage, main living area, and what appears to be a backyard with a pool. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall and is accented by a few ornamental trees and shrubs. The house includes a driveway leading to the garage, and the main entrance is marked by a small porch with a canopy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious open layout, featuring a garage, pool, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and two ornamental trees in front of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, a section of the backyard, and the pool area, with some landscaping visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard, pool, and patio area, with the boundary wall enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and additional sections of the house, with the garage and entry less visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat canopy, small porch, and minimalistic door design, flanked by landscaping.
